hooks.command: echo '{"additionalContext": "[HOOK after Edit/Write] 🔥 PRE-COMMIT CHECKLIST (after 2026-04-19 handleSyncCoupons runtime crash): (a) npm test -- --run ALL PASS (b) npm run build clean — catches Edit silent-fail that tests miss (c) area audit: backend file → /audit-backend-firestore-only; api/proclinic/*.js → grep-pair every `case x:` has `async function handleX`; new collection → /audit-anti-vibe-code (d) end-to-end trace for mutation paths (e) CODEBASE_MAP if backend files touched. [EDIT-TOOL TRAP] a parameter typo errors silently — every Edit success must be paired with a grep confirming the text landed. [RULE E] backend UI ห้าม import brokerClient ยกเว้น MasterDataTab. Backend = commit-only. vercel --prod รอ user สั่ง THIS TURN."}'

bash -c 'INPUT=$(cat); CMD=$(echo "$INPUT" | jq -r ".tool_input.command"); if echo "$CMD" | grep -qE "(backend|Backend|SaleTab|CloneTab|CustomerListTab|CustomerCard|CustomerDetailView|MasterDataTab|AppointmentTab|FinanceTab|DepositPanel|WalletPanel|MembershipPanel|PointsPanel|TreatmentFormPage|BackendDashboard)"; then echo "BLOCKED: Backend files should NOT be deployed via vercel --prod. Commit only." >&2; exit 2; fi; exit 0'

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *)   [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] &&   echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Read graphify-out/GRAPH_REPORT.md for god nodes and community structure before searching raw files."}}'   || true ;; esac

echo '{"additionalContext": "[🚨 MANDATORY FIRST READ: .claude/rules/00-session-start.md — character, expectations, iron-clad, past violations, workflow checklist.] [IRON-CLAD 2026-04-19] A. ทำ X แล้ว Y พัง → ถอด X ทันที. B. firebase deploy --only firestore:rules ต้อง probe webhook + sync unauth writes ก่อน/หลัง — 403 = revert ทันที. C. Rule of 3 / crypto.getRandomValues / NO user.uid in public docs / NO allow:if-true ยกเว้น pc_* + chat_conversations / NO premature Firestore collection. D. bug → adversarial test + audit skill invariant + /audit-all registration. E. 🆕 BACKEND = FIRESTORE ONLY — src/components/backend/** + BackendDashboard.jsx ห้าม import brokerClient หรือ fetch /api/proclinic/* ยกเว้น MasterDataTab.jsx. Phase 9 ละเมิดด้วยการให้ PromotionTab/CouponTab/VoucherTab POST ProClinic — REVERTED. Audit: /audit-backend-firestore-only. F. Triangle Rule: ห้ามเดา URL/method — opd.js intel|click|fill|network capture จริง ก่อน/ระหว่างทำ. [SESSION CONTEXT] Phase 8/12 DONE. Phase 9 Firestore-only rework in progress. [DEPLOY] vercel --prod รอ user สั่ง THIS TURN ทุกครั้ง — prior auth ไม่ roll over."}'

echo '{"additionalContext": "[IRON-CLAD PRE-PROMPT] A: bug → revert. B: firestore:rules probe-deploy-probe. C: Rule of 3 / crypto tokens / no uid in public docs / no allow:if-true. D: bug → test + skill. E: backend = Firestore only (no brokerClient in non-MasterDataTab). F: Triangle — opd.js capture before guessing URL/method. Deploy wait for user per-turn. See .claude/rules/00-session-start.md first."}'
